title: Dollar Dominance Looms Over Global Banks' G7 Stablecoin Ambitions
message_html: Dollar Dominance Looms Over Global Banks' G7 Stablecoin Ambitions ...
snippet: At the end of 2025, when a consortium of ten global banks announced they were exploring a stablecoin tied to G7 currencies, the news carried the weight of inevitability.
